sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9462" key="a)ntanoi/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντᾰνοίγω</orth>, <sense id="n9462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">open against,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. ὄμματα κεραυνοῖς</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">face</tr_> them, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
